overview: Four black athletes compete for the U.S. at the 1936 Berlin Olympics, led by sprinter Jesse Owens.
title: Race

overview: The true story of Olympic runner Louis Zamperini, who survived a plane crash and a brutal POW camp.
title: Unbroken

overview: A high school football team in newly integrated 1971 Virginia overcomes prejudice to win.
title: Remember the Titans

overview: Boxer Rocky Balboa fights for redemption and a shot at the heavyweight title.
title: Rocky

overview: A homeless black teen is taken in by a family and becomes an All-American offensive lineman.
title: The Blind Side

overview: A college football team rebuilds after tragedy strikes the program and the town.
title: We Are Marshall

overview: Notre Dame walk-on Rudy Ruettiger refuses to give up his dream of playing college football.
title: Rudy

overview: Texas Western's all-black starting five wins the 1966 NCAA basketball championship.
title: Glory Road

overview: Baseball's Jackie Robinson breaks the color barrier with the Brooklyn Dodgers in 1947.
Three black women mathematicians are vital to NASA's early space race success.
title: Hidden Figures

overview: An aging baseball pitcher chases one last shot at the major leagues.
title: The Rookie

overview: A Philadelphia bartender gets an improbable tryout with the NFL's Eagles.
title: Invincible

overview: A washed-up boxing trainer takes on a determined young woman as his fighter.
title: Million Dollar Baby

overview: Boxer Micky Ward fights his way up while battling family dysfunction in Lowell.
title: The Fighter

overview: Apollo Creed's son trains under Rocky Balboa to make his own name in boxing.
title: Creed

overview: The 1936 University of Washington rowing crew chases an unlikely Olympic gold.
title: The Boys in the Boat

overview: Olympic runner Steve Prefontaine's rise and his rivalry with the establishment.
title: Without Limits

overview: The legendary 1980 U.S. Olympic hockey team upsets the Soviet Union.
title: Miracle

overview: Coach Ken Carter benches his undefeated team to demand academic accountability.
title: Coach Carter

overview: A documentary following the Alabama Crimson Tide through a championship football season.
title: Roll Tide: A Season in Tuscaloosa

overview: A newly integrated high school football team in 1971 Virginia.
title: Remember the Titans

overview: The first NCAA team to start five black players wins the 1966 title.

overview: Jackie Robinson breaks Major League Baseball's color barrier.
